content: {"analyses": [{"source_url": "https://research.fs.usda.gov/treesearch/53006", "source_title": "Long-term CO2 production following permafrost thawing", "source_type": "web", "source_quality": 0.7, "overall_relevance": 0.65, "year": 0, "authors": [], "venue": "", "doi": "", "atomic_facts": [{"statement": "Sigsgaard | | Year: | 2013 | | Type: | Scientific Journal | | Station: | Pacific Northwest Research Station | Abstract Thawing permafrost re...", "direct_quote": "Sigsgaard | | Year: | 2013 | | Type: | Scientific Journal | | Station: | Pacific Northwest Research Station | Abstract Thawing permafrost represents a poorly understood feedback mechanism of climate change in the Arctic, but with a potential impact o", "fact_category": "statistic", "relevance_score": 0.65, "confidence": 0.88, "perspective": "Scientific", "entities": []}, {"statement": "We have quantified the long-term loss of carbon (C) from thawing permafrost in Northeast Greenland from 1996 to 2008 by combining repeated s...", "direct_quote": "We have quantified the long-term loss of carbon (C) from thawing permafrost in Northeast Greenland from 1996 to 2008 by combining repeated sediment sampling to assess changes in C stock and >12 years of CO2 production in incubated permafrost samples.", "fact_category": "statistic", "relevance_score": 0.65, "confidence": 0.88, "perspective": "Scientific", "entities": []}, {"statement": "Field observations show that the activelayer thickness has increased by >1 cm yr-1 but thawing has not resulted in a detectable decline in C...", "direct_quote": "Field observations show that the activelayer thickness has increased by >1 cm yr-1 but thawing has not resulted in a detectable decline in C stocks.", "fact_category": "statistic", "relevance_score": 0.65, "confidence": 0.88, "perspective": "Scientific", "entities": []}], "evidence_summary": "Auto-extracted 3 facts."}]}
